title: Suzuka F1: Ferrari’s double-edged weapon explained 🚨 #Ferrari #SF26 #F1 #JapaneseGP #Mercedes #race
description:
Suzuka is always one of the toughest and most technical tracks in Formula 1, but this year it’s also a major test of energy management—and that could shape the entire race weekend.

Coming into Japan, Mercedes looks like the clear favorite. After a strong performance in China, they appear to have the most complete package on the grid. Suzuka suits them perfectly, especially with their top speed and excellent battery management. With the FIA limiting the use of active aerodynamics, energy deploym

title: F1 LIVE: Verstappen's Major Announcement & Hamilton Investigation Result Explained
description: Breaking F1 news: Max Verstappen reveals a major new project ahead of the Japanese Grand Prix in Suzuka, while the FIA delivers a key ruling affecting Lewis Hamilton. We break down what this means for the season, potential impacts on teams, and what to watch for in the race weekend. Includes quick explainer on the Hamilton ruling, implications for standings, and what Verstappen’s announcement signals for the future of his racing empire. Stay tuned for live updates and expert analysis from Suzuka

title: Game On At Mercedes? | Japanese GP Preview | F1 Nation Podcast
description:
As Formula 1 heads to Suzuka, Japan, a teammate battle is brewing. George Russell and Kimi Antonelli have driven the pace-setting Mercedes to one win each. How will they race each other this season? How will Mercedes handle their drivers? Max Verstappen has been linked to Mercedes in the past, so are George and Kimi also racing to keep their place in the team?

Tom Clarkson, former F1 driver Jolyon Palmer and IndyCar race winner James Hinchcliffe talk about the magic of Suzuka, the early season

title: How Jacques Villeneuve Shook Up F1 | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast
description:
The son of a motorsport legend, a racer since childhood, Formula 1 was Jacques Villeneuve's destiny. In 1996, the young Canadian arrived at his first Grand Prix and immediately proved he belonged there by taking pole position.

In his rookie season Villeneuve won races, went wheel-to-wheel with Michael Schumacher and took Williams teammate Damon Hill to a final race title-decider. 30 years on, he sits down with Tom Clarkson to remember how he shook up the sport.

CEO Dan Towriss takes Tom Clarkson back to the start of the story - how he and his TWG Motorsports company first became involved in discussions about F1, conversations with General Motors and Cadillac, the work to build a team, choosing their race drivers and making their F1 debut in Australia.

Sergio Perez and Valtteri Bottas are the first Cadillac F1 drivers.

title: Australian grand prix Review | Day 10 of learning #F1 #drivetosurvive  #f1explained
description:
Ferrari… we have the car, we have the drivers… but strategy?”

What a crazy season opener at the Australian Grand Prix 🏁
George Russell wins the race, leading a Mercedes 1-2 with Kimi Antonelli, while Ferrari finishes P3 and P4 with Leclerc and Hamilton despite strong pace.

Meanwhile Max Verstappen climbed from P20 to P6, one of the drives of the race.

The 2026 F1 season has started with drama already.

description:

title: The Fastest Lap In F1 History - Lewis Hamilton's Pole Lap | 2020 Italian Grand Prix | Pirelli
description:
Lewis Hamilton breaks the record for the the fastest ever lap in F1 - an average speed of 264.362 km/h! It was his 94th career pole, claiming the Pirelli Pole Position Award as a result.

This lap was subsequently beaten in 2025 by Max Verstappen, who clocked an average speed of 264.682 km/h when taking pole.
